title: TERESTO MORD
description: This is a mod in which I test things, such as custom models, NPCs, ect.
body:
This is a mod in which I allow other people to test my mods. I am applying this to add for servers so, if you want it for yourself, just download it. I will be adding models, guns, bosses, entities and even custom weapons and abilities(hopefully).
Currently, there are custom blocks, tools, powerups, even a custom dimension and more! The general theme is "MUD", as it was a basically ancient joke in my friend group that I made into a mod.
If you download this mod, you will be able to see an aspiring mod developer grow and make more and more intricate mods! You'll also be able to play with a very goofy mod and do some chaotic stuff(E.G launching yourself 98579 blocks or something around that after walking on one MUD 4.0 block,coming next update) If I blow up, you might get a special role too, if I ever create a Discord server or alike!
The name is just a dumb way of saying "Test Mod".
